name: csv2geo-sdk
description: Node.js SDK for CSV2GEO Geocoding API — 461M+ addresses, 39 countries, 48+ endpoints. Forward, reverse, batch, places, boundaries (postcode → polygon, ancestors walk-up, children walk-down, consolidated cities), IP geolocation with county overlay, vector tiles, static map images, coverage, autocomplete. 3,000 free requests/day.
author: Scale Campaign <info@scalecampaign.com>
